response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DLang systems, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role: deep JVM expertise, Java/Kotlin mastery, Spring ecosystem experience, and IDE internals. Java appears only in a brief mention from 2009-2011 (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) and as a listed skill without depth. No Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or IDE/language-tooling experience is evident. The closest adjacent work is a brief stint at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI (a C IDE) in 2007-2008.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and architecture
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling)
Prior exposure to IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience
No Kotlin experience; Java usage is dated and shallow
No evidence of IDE internals or language tooling work in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Lack of Spring/JVM enterprise framework experience
No Kotlin and only dated/shallow Java exposure
Strong general engineering and craftsmanship background
